notes: Witness-parametric formalization of Silverman III.4.8 (isogenies are group homomorphisms), factoring through Pic⁰ via three open tickets (T-PIC-A-002, T-PIC-C-003, T-III-3-003). No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides; the main theorem AddHomProperty_of_picZero_witnesses is a 65-line calc-chain diagram chase. The file is an API bridge: picZeroSumOfWitness and picZeroSumOfWitness_picZeroOfPoint are consumed by at least three other files (NoFinitePolesBridge, AFConditional, MillerAllChar), while pushforwardPicZeroOfWitness and picZeroOfPoint_pushforwardPicZero appear unused outside this file except through AddHomProperty_of_picZero_witnesses.
